label: Sound filter: echo
description: Unity AudioEchoFilter applied to this sub-sound.

decayRatio.label: Decay ratio
decayRatio.description: Echo decay ratio: fraction of previous echo amplitude. Range 0–1.

wetMix.label: Wet mix
wetMix.description: Volume of the echo signal. Range 0–1.

dryMix.label: Dry mix
dryMix.description: Volume of the original signal. Range 0–1.
